description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a modern, urban appearance. He is wearing a long-sleeved, button-up plaid shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the forearms, paired with loose-fitting cargo pants that have visible side pockets. His footwear consists of casual sneakers, and he accessorizes with round sunglasses. The individual has a neatly styled, short haircut with the hair swept back. His overall look suggests a relaxed, fashionable style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a plaid shirt, cargo pants, sneakers, and sunglasses, styled for an urban environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plaid shirt, sunglasses, and relaxed stance with arms slightly out.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, sunglasses, and the side pockets of the cargo pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the plaid shirt, hairstyle, and the full length of the cargo pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, rolled-up sleeves, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and cargo pants
